title: Employee Survey Earns Chugach a Title as “Best Place to Work” by the Alaska Journal of Commerce
summary: Chugach President Josie Hickel added, “The fact that Chugach is one of the best places to work in Alaska as recognized by the Alaska Journal of Commerce is a reflection of our incredible employees. The success we have enjoyed over the last 50 years was entirely made possible by each of their contributions.” Hickel...
